name: Thoughtspot
description: MCP Server for ThoughtSpot - provides OAuth authentication and tools for querying data
longDescription: ThoughtSpot Spotter MCP Server for AI-powered analytics. Query data with natural language, get answers to business questions, create liveboards, and access ThoughtSpot analytics from any MCP-compatible client.
author: app.thoughtspot
examplePrompts: What were our top revenue sources last quarter?
Show me sales by region for this year
Create a liveboard with marketing metrics
Compare customer acquisition costs across channels
What's the trend for monthly active users?
